choose.when:
SELECT TO_CHAR(dtr.add_datetime, 'YYYY') as time, COUNT(*) as count, NULL as duration FROM discussion_topic_reply dtr INNER JOIN discussion_topic dt ON dtr.topic_id = dt.id WHERE dt.textbook_id = #{textbookId}
AND dtr.add_datetime >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{startTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND dtr.add_datetime <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{endTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(dtr.add_datetime, 'YYYY') ORDER BY time

SELECT TO_CHAR(dtr.add_datetime, 'YYYY-MM') as time, COUNT(*) as count, NULL as duration FROM discussion_topic_reply dtr INNER JOIN discussion_topic dt ON dtr.topic_id = dt.id WHERE dt.textbook_id = #{textbookId}
AND dtr.add_datetime >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{startTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND dtr.add_datetime <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{endTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(dtr.add_datetime, 'YYYY-MM') ORDER BY time

SELECT TO_CHAR(dtr.add_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as time, COUNT(*) as count, NULL as duration FROM discussion_topic_reply dtr INNER JOIN discussion_topic dt ON dtr.topic_id = dt.id WHERE dt.textbook_id = #{textbookId}
AND dtr.add_datetime >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{startTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND dtr.add_datetime <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{endTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(dtr.add_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY time

SELECT TO_CHAR(ll.add_datetime, 'YYYY') as time, COUNT(DISTINCT ll.user_id) as count, COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) as duration FROM learning_log ll WHERE ll.textbook_id = #{textbookId} AND ll.data_type = 0
AND ll.add_datetime >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{startTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND ll.add_datetime <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{endTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(ll.add_datetime, 'YYYY') ORDER BY time

SELECT TO_CHAR(ll.add_datetime, 'YYYY-MM') as time, COUNT(DISTINCT ll.user_id) as count, COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) as duration FROM learning_log ll WHERE ll.textbook_id = #{textbookId} AND ll.data_type = 0
AND ll.add_datetime >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{startTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND ll.add_datetime <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{endTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(ll.add_datetime, 'YYYY-MM') ORDER BY time

SELECT TO_CHAR(ll.add_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as time, COUNT(DISTINCT ll.user_id) as count, COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) as duration FROM learning_log ll WHERE ll.textbook_id = #{textbookId} AND ll.data_type = 0
AND ll.add_datetime >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{startTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND ll.add_datetime <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{endTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(ll.add_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY time
